mindmap
  root((工程组项目学习))
    总览层
      两仓定位
      阅读导航
    新人启动层
      service 启动
      webcreator 启动
    主链理解层
      项目 聊天 配置

    专题深挖层
      权限风控

      模板知识源
      节点化执行
    排障收口层
      trace 对齐
      状态回写
      demo 联动

specs.name: platform-demo-sequence
specs.anchor_substring: 更新链为什么仍然先回平台仓

blocks.text: Mermaid 时序图：平台请求怎样收敛成最终 demo

blocks.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant FE as Frontend
    participant API as Platform API
    participant PZ as PZ Service
    participant Proxy as RequestProxy
    participant Engine as Webcreator v2
    participant Exec as Execution Flow
    participant State as Project ProjectConfig

    FE->>API: 发起 requirement update demo 请求
    API->>PZ: 进入平台主链
    PZ->>PZ: 风控 额度 状态准备
    PZ->>Proxy: 组装跨仓参数
    Proxy->>Engine: 调用 v2 接口
    Engine->>Exec: 启动生成或修改执行
    Exec-->>Engine: 返回结构化结果或 url
    Engine-->>Proxy: 结束本次执行
    Proxy-->>PZ: 回传结果
    PZ->>State: 回写项目 配置 聊天状态
    PZ-->>FE: 返回平台认可的最终结果

specs.name: trace-sequence
specs.anchor_substring: 平台侧日志为什么更适合先看“入口归属”

blocks.text: Mermaid 时序图：trace_id 怎样穿过双仓并落到 exec_id

blocks.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant FE as Frontend
    participant PT as Platform TraceMiddleware
    participant API as Platform API
    participant Proxy as RequestProxy
    participant WT as Webcreator TraceMiddleware
    participant Exec as Engine Exec
    participant Log as Execute Log

    FE->>PT: 带入或接收 trace_id
    PT->>API: 写入 request context
    API->>Proxy: 进入跨仓调用
    Proxy->>WT: 透传同一个 trace_id
    WT->>Exec: 启动执行并继承 trace_id
    Exec->>Log: 记录 exec_id 节点进度 状态
    Exec-->>WT: 返回 progress 或结果
    WT-->>Proxy: 保留同一 trace_id
    Proxy-->>API: 返回引擎结果
    API-->>FE: 响应 X-Trace-ID

blocks.text: Mermaid 时序图：启动执行 拿到 exec_id 再轮询 finish node

blocks.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Caller as Service Caller
    participant SR as single_response_service
    participant Http as HttpUtil
    participant Engine as Single Responsibility API
    participant Log as execute_log_service

    Caller->>SR: 发起生成或修改动作
    SR->>Http: single_responsibility_execute
    Http->>Engine: 启动执行
    Engine-->>Http: 返回 exec_id
    Http-->>SR: start_resp
    SR->>Log: 记录 running log
    loop progress polling
        SR->>Http: single_responsibility_progress
        Http->>Engine: 查询 exec_id 进度
        Engine-->>Http: 返回 status 节点计数 all_nodes
        Http-->>SR: progress_data
    end
    SR->>SR: 选择 finish node 抽取结果
    SR->>Log: 更新 success 或 fail
    SR-->>Caller: 返回最终结果
